data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: All available metrics (xG, PPG, main odds) consistently indicate União de Leiria as favorites. Significant data gaps exist for O2.5/BTTS odds, standings, H2H, and key sidelined players.

CONCLUSION: First Half Over 0.5
